title: Walk-in Drive Logistics Manager at Allcargo Logistics

jsonLd.title: Walk-in Drive Logistics Manager at Allcargo Logistics
jsonLd.description:
Join the Allcargo Logistics family as a Logistics Manager in Howrah. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Allcargo Logistics:
Allcargo Logistics is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Optimize delivery routes to reduce cost and improve efficiency
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Ensure compliance with transportation regulations and safety standards
• Prepare MIS reports on delivery performance and SLA adherence
• Manage reverse logistics and return merchandise authorization
• Handle customs clearance for import and export shipments
• Coordinate with customer service teams to resolve delivery issues

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in GPS Tracking Systems
• Proficiency in TMS
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in 3PL Management
• Proficiency in Fleet Management
• Proficiency in Last Mile Delivery
• Proficiency in Route Optimization
• Proficiency in SAP SCM

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Maternity and paternity leave
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Howrah, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Allcargo Logistics!
